/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/NetOrc.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/NetOrc.dir/src/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NetOrc.dir/src/core/Classes/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NetOrc.dir/src/api/SouthBoundInterface/Classes/SouthBoundInterface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NetOrc.dir/src/api/SouthBoundInterface/Utils/HandleData.cpp.o -o NetOrc
